text:
The Black Bats are Terrorist Organization that solely appears in Fullmetal Alchemist: The Sacred Star Of Milos. It is run by the leader of the organization, Miranda.

Appearance

As expected from their name, the Black Bats look similar to actual bats, featuring Gliders with Bat Wings, and Black Suits.

Members

Miranda
Julia
Melvin (Atlas Disguised as Ashleigh, betrays the organization later in the film)
Vatanen
